attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.ADDITION_COST_TO_CLEAR, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.ASSET_ID, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.BONUS_DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.BONUS_DEPRN_AMOUNT, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.BONUS_DEPRN_EXP_JE_LINE_NUM, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.BONUS_DEPRN_RESERVE, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.BONUS_DEPRN_RSV_JE_LINE_NUM, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.BONUS_YTD_DEPRN, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.BOOK_TYPE_CODE, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.COST, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT, 
(MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.DEPRN_AMOUNT - COALESCE(MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,0)) AS DEPRN_AMOUNT,
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.DEPRN_RESERVE, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.DEPRN_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.DEPRN_RUN_DATE, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.DEPRN_SOURCE_CODE, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.DISTRIBUTION_ID, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.JE_HEADER_ID, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.PERIOD_COUNTER, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.REVAL_AMORTIZATION, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.REVAL_AMORT_JE_LINE_NUM, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.REVAL_RESERVE, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.REVAL_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.YTD_DEPRN, 
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.YTD_REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE,
MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.EVENT_ID 
FROM
 MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL
WHERE 
 MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
